features: High-Speed Cooling & Lightweight: JISULIFE handheld fan features upgraded air inlets and outlets, enhancing cooling performance while reducing resistance by 30%. Its efficient 3700RPM motor delivers powerful airflow (3.0-6.0 m/s) in a compact body—perfect for travel cooling. This makes it an ideal Christmas gifts for women to bring refreshing comfort during the festive season. Wrap up something practical and thoughtful this holiday—a perfect Christmas present for loved ones

4000mAh Rechargeable Holiday Fan: Hand fan is a must-have gift! Featuring a festive design, rechargeable portable fan is powered by a reliable battery. Charge it in just 2-3 hours and enjoy up to 22 hours of use. The built-in power indicator makes it easy to use. Wrap up the perfect present for friends and family!

5 Cooling Wind Speeds: Experience personalized comfort with 5 precise speed settings on hand held fans. From a gentle breeze to a powerful cooling gust, mini fan delivers perfect airflow for any situation. As early Christmas presents, ideas for women

9 Blade Design - Quiet: With 9 ultra-quiet blades, small fan operates at a low noise level of 56-76 dB, ensuring a peaceful cooling experience. And the aerodynamic blades deliver strong, stable airflow for optimal comfort

Safety Lock & Dense Grille: JISULIFE rechargeable travel fan has added safety locks and thickened grille designs to prevent accidental touches on the switch and contact with the blades. Enhanced protection, enjoy worry-free cooling. In addition, JISULIFE provides a 1-year warranty period. During this time, our dedicated support team is available to assist you with any issues arising during product usage
